name_en: 【Exclusive Photo m13992 White】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This zippy wallet is made of monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. Named for its secure wraparound zipper, it is lined with grained leather. Fully functional, it can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)
